name: Karnataka SC/ST Entrepreneurship Development Scheme (KSSDCL)
administered_by: Karnataka State SC/ST Development Corporation Limited (KSSDCL)
retrieval_text: KSSDCL provides composite term loans at concessional interest rates of 4-6% per annum to Scheduled Caste and Scheduled Tribe entrepreneurs in Karnataka for setting up or expanding micro enterprises in manufacturing, services, and trading. Loans from Rs 1 lakh to Rs 10 lakh are available without collateral. A capital subsidy of up to 30% of the project cost is also available for eligible applicants. The applicant must be a permanent resident of Karnataka, belong to a notified SC or ST community, and must not have previously availed benefits under any similar state or central self-employment scheme.
